rulings.Case Title: MANTRA GROUP LLC. VS. ANNABELLE ABRIGO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft Adn Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 11, line 8.PLAINTIFF MANTRA GROUP LLC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant and Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant shall provide responses to Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production by personal service no later than April 16, 2014. Objections are waived. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $825. = (501/REQ)
